item.name: Profiles

description.content: Operations for managing subscriber profiles

item.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Profiles

request.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Profiles

description.content: Returns a paginated list of subscriber profiles in the Adobe Campaign database. Profiles can be filtered by email, first name, last name, and custom attributes using query parameters.

query.description: Maximum number of profiles to return per page.

info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Campaign API

description.content:
The Adobe Campaign API provides RESTful access to Adobe Campaign Standard and Classic capabilities for managing marketing campaigns, profiles, services, workflows, transactional messages, and content. It enables programmatic creation and execution of email, SMS, and push notification campaigns, subscriber management, and real-time transactional messaging.

Contact Support:
 Name: Adobe Developer
